name: Synthograsizer Glitcher + LongLive
description: Preprocesses webcam/canvas input with glitch effects before feeding into LongLive diffusion pipeline.
notes: Load the companion pipeline first to launch the Synthograsizer web UI.
Load LongLive as the main diffusion pipeline.
Load the glitcher as a preprocessor to apply real-time effects to the video input.
All glitcher parameters appear in Scope's Input & Controls panel and can be mapped to MIDI/OSC.
The Synthograsizer web UI streams p5.js canvas frames to Scope via WebRTC.
Prompt updates from the Synthograsizer flow through the WebRTC data channel.
